note: Model manifest for PerfectFit. Orca Slicer generates all core calibration tests in-slicer, so no models are bundled or required. The entries below are optional external aids. None are redistributed here because their licenses do not clearly permit bundling; users download them from the source. You may drop your own STL/3MF copies into this folder for convenience — the app never reads them, they are just stored alongside for organization.

models.license: Creative Commons BY-ND 4.0 (free to download and print; no redistribution of modified files)
models.recommendedUse: Compact all-in-one verification: hull surfaces, overhangs, bridge roof, small details, chimney stringing.

models.license: See model page; check before any redistribution
models.attribution: Community stringing/retraction test models on Printables
models.recommendedUse: Stringing evaluation when the slicer lacks a retraction tower generator; change only retraction distance between prints.

models.attribution: Stefan Hermann / CNC Kitchen — Extrusion Test Structure (inspiration for Orca's built-in test)
models.recommendedUse: Measuring max volumetric flow without Orca's generator.
